sidebar._comment: Sidebar panel navigation tabs and general controls

customization._comment: Sidebar -> Customization tab: options for app colors and theme overrides
customization.title: Customization
customization.darkThemeHint: Dark themes are best suited for dark colored wallpapers.
customization.lightThemeHint: Light themes are best suited for light colored wallpapers.

widgets._comment: Sidebar -> Widgets tab: display names of individual widgets in the layout switcher

settings._comment: Sidebar -> Settings tab: labels and descriptive guides for global settings
settings.title: Settings
settings.customSearchHint: Enter the search query URL. You can use the {query} placeholder anywhere in the URL (e.g., https://domain.com/?s={query}), otherwise the search query will be appended directly to the end of the URL.

options._comment: Dropdown lists, selector options, dynamic theme colors, and toggle choices inside Settings

info._comment: Sidebar -> About tab: details regarding project version, author, and credits
info.tagline: Just a new tab for your browser, but cooler...

onboarding._comment: Guided welcome onboarding tour steps shown on first install or manually launched
onboarding.welcomeDesc: Click below to explore the core features and customization options of CoolTab. You can also relaunch this guided tour at any time from the sidebar.
onboarding.step1Desc: Hover your mouse in this bottom-left corner to reveal the action buttons. These buttons let you choose wallpapers, share your style, edit the widgets and access to settings panel.
onboarding.step2Desc: Click here to open the wallpaper gallery.
onboarding.step3Desc: Here you can browse and select from a variety of beautiful backgrounds to personalize your tab.
onboarding.step4Desc: Once you design a beautiful layout and color scheme, you can share it with the community here.
onboarding.step5Desc: Click here to activate the edit mode.
onboarding.step6Desc: In edit mode, you can resize widgets and drag them to relocate them anywhere on the layout grid.
onboarding.step7Desc: Click here to open the sidebar.
onboarding.step8Desc: On customization tab you can adjust colors of your new tab by selecting from predefined color palettes that supports both light and dark themes.
onboarding.step9Desc: A style is a saved snapshot of all your settings, including background image, layout columns, colors, and active widgets. You can save, manage, and swap your personal styles here.
onboarding.step10Desc: Check out and apply stunning styles created and shared by other CoolTab users around the world.
onboarding.step11Desc: Enable or disable individual widgets like weather forecasts, clocks, stock tickers, location visualizers, calendars, and todo lists.
onboarding.step12Desc: Customize global preferences for your tab. Here you can configure wallpaper, search engines, search behavior, weather/stock update intervals, layout columns, and background size settings.
onboarding.step13Desc: Check the application version, explore release notes, and read more about the features of this tab manager.
onboarding.step14Desc: You can run this tour anytime you want to learn about the features of CoolTab.

share._comment: Style sharing popup overlays and form validation metrics
share.title: Share Your Style
share.subtitle: Share your custom style with the CoolTab community
share.successPrefix: Success! Your style will be shared on
share.successSuffix: in a couple of days after review.
share.rateLimitError: You can only share 1 style per day. Please try again tomorrow.

update._comment: Toast alert shown at the bottom of the screen upon extension updates

buttons._comment: Interactive generic button overlays visible at the bottom of the tab view

styles._comment: Sidebar -> Styles tab: labels and prompt dialogs for local theme presets
styles.saveLookOrBrowseHint: Save your current look or browse Community Styles.
styles.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this style?

community._comment: Sidebar -> Community tab: loading, success, and error feedback for shared presets
community.title: Community Styles
community.subtitle: Discover styles shared by the CoolTab community

gallery._comment: Wallpaper gallery overlays and pagination status indicator

stockGuide._comment: Help documentation popup detailing ticker symbol syntax for search queries
stockGuide.title: Stock Search Guide
stockGuide.intro: CoolTab uses Yahoo Finance symbols to track real-time data. You can search for stocks, cryptocurrencies, currencies, and more.
stockGuide.stocksDesc: Use standard ticker symbols for US markets. For international markets, append the exchange suffix.
stockGuide.cryptoDesc: Track cryptocurrencies by pairing them with a fiat currency (USD, EUR, GBP, etc.).
stockGuide.currencyDesc: Monitor Forex exchange rates by adding the =X suffix to the currency pair.
stockGuide.commoditiesDesc: Track commodity prices using their futures symbols with the =F suffix.
stockGuide.turkishDesc: Follow Borsa Istanbul stocks by adding the .IS suffix.
stockGuide.indicesDesc: Track major market indices using the ^ prefix.

stocks._comment: Stocks widget interface controls and loading status indicators

todo._comment: Todo List widget: headers, input action placeholders, and limit validation indicators
todo.title: Tasks

search._comment: Main search bar placeholder message visible in the center of the tab

weather._comment: Weather widgets labels, environmental status indexes, and loading fallbacks

location._comment: Hemisphere indicators for the Location Globe widget visualizer

dropdownList._comment: Settings -> Quick Links editing lists inputs and selected link counters

geo._comment: Translations for dynamic city/country coordinates returned by API queries

weather_cond._comment: Translations for dynamic current weather condition texts returned by API queries
